[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0011110100 5
1 0101011100 5
2 1011111001 7
3 1111001111 8
4 0100001010 3
5 0010111111 7
6 1111111101 9
7 1111110011 8
